query:
SELECT s.id, s.status, sp.playerId, sp.totalScore, sp.handsWon, sp.handsPlayed
FROM sessions s
JOIN session_players sp ON sp.sessionId = s.id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
ORDER BY s.id, sp.playerId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25EMAuqsXNnxbn4.root --database UFmRayAUKBpWQhew29rCsn --execute SELECT s.id, s.status, sp.playerId, sp.totalScore, sp.handsWon, sp.handsPlayed
FROM sessions s
JOIN session_players sp ON sp.sessionId = s.id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
ORDER BY s.id, sp.playerId;
